from utils.supabase_client import get_client
supabase = get_client\(\)
result = supabase.table\('video_jobs'\).select\('id, title_concept, status, voice_url, scene_prompts'\).order\('created_at', desc=False\).execute\(\)
for job in result.data:
    has_voice = bool\(job.get\('voice_url'\)\)
    has_scenes = bool\(job.get\('scene_prompts'\)\)
    print\(f\\"{job['status']:20} | voice={has_voice} | scenes={has_scenes} | {job['id'][:8]}… | {job.get\('title_concept',''\)[:50]}\\"\)
")
